text_block_list.text:
The waiting room is quiet as Fuji Kiseki and I sit,
waiting for the Satsuki Sho to begin.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hi, Fuji! Sorry to call you right before your race!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You're totally fine. Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Well, the truth is, everyone came to watch
you run today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We wanted to make sure our cheers reached you,
so we all came! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You've got this, Fuji! ☆ We can't wait to see the
show!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Totally! No one stands a chance against you!

Smiling faces and waving hands fill the screen of
Fuji Kiseki's phone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you guys... This is such an amazing surprise!
I never would have imagined this!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you so much, my ponies.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure not to disappoint you in today's
race. I am your dorm leader, after all!

Even through the screen, the cheers and screams
from the stands are loud. The curtains have risen
on the Satsuki Sho!
